settings.title: Shop PRO Fitness Trampolines | Wellness & TRUE COLORS

settings.custom_liquid:
<script>
  document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
    const discountedHandles = [
      "jumpsport-39-pro-fitness-trampoline",
"39-essential-fitness-trampoline",
      "39-premium-fitness-trampoline"
    ];

    function applyDiscountToBoostPrices() {
      const productItems = document.querySelectorAll(".boost-sd__product-item");

      productItems.forEach(item => {
        const dataProductRaw = item.getAttribute("data-product");
        if (!dataProductRaw) return;

        let productData;
        try {
          productData = JSON.parse(dataProductRaw.replace(/"/g, '"'));
        } catch (e) {
          console.error("Invalid JSON in data-product", e);
          return;
        }

        const handle = productData?.handle;
        const priceMin = parseFloat(productData?.priceMin);

        if (!handle || !discountedHandles.includes(handle) || isNaN(priceMin)) return;

        const priceSpan = item.querySelector(".boost-sd__product-price--default .boost-sd__format-currency");
        if (!priceSpan || priceSpan.dataset.discountApplied === "true") return;

        const discountedPrice = (priceMin * 0.85).toFixed(2);

        // Create sale price span
        const salePriceEl = document.createElement("span");
        salePriceEl.style.marginRight = "6px";
        salePriceEl.style.color = "black";
        salePriceEl.textContent = `$${discountedPrice}`;

        // Create original price span
        const originalPriceEl = document.createElement("span");
        originalPriceEl.style.textDecoration = "line-through";
        originalPriceEl.style.color = "black";
        originalPriceEl.textContent = `$${priceMin.toFixed(2)}`;

        // Clear and inject new content
        priceSpan.textContent = "";
        priceSpan.appendChild(salePriceEl);
        priceSpan.appendChild(originalPriceEl);
        priceSpan.dataset.discountApplied = "true";
      });
    }

    // Initial run after Boost loads products
    setTimeout(applyDiscountToBoostPrices, 1000);

    // Observe Boost re-renders
    const observer = new MutationObserver(applyDiscountToBoostPrices);
    observer.observe(document.body, { childList: true, subtree: true });
  });
</script>
